narrative:
Englewood-G (precinct in Montgomery County) has 934 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points.
